title: Penguh's Swift Sneak Fishing
description: Fish up Swift Sneak in Ancient Cities!
body:
`👋🦊 This project has been archived! Please check out this pack instead:` [Penug's Renewables](https://modrinth.com/datapack/penugs-renewables)

About

- While in an Ancient City, there's a chance the enchanted books you fish up contain `Swift Sneak I-III`. - You may also occasionally fish up enchanted diamond leggings in Ancient Cities, which just like the books have a chance to come enchanted with `Swift Sneak I-III`.

Disclaimer

On top of only having a `50% chance` for these items to come with Swift Sneak, they are part of the _Treasure_ fishing loot table, meaning they are incredibly rare. This is **not** meant to be an efficient source of Swift Sneak, just an addition to make it renewable in a unique way.
